name: Denied comp for chemicals because no immediate symptoms - appeal?

mainEntity.name: Denied comp for chemicals because no immediate symptoms - appeal?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, latent effects like cancer qualify as occupational; appeal with expert links.** Many denials overturned[2][6]. **Key factors:** Diagnosis timing. **Practical guidance:** New docs, hygienist report. Lawyer essential. **Latency doesn't deny.**
